svg.title: CableTwin Day 2 hybrid decision architecture
svg.desc: A synthetic factory scenario drives a simulated twin and telemetry view. A deterministic non-learning planner builds three recovery routes. A separate local learned recommender, trained on 687 incidents simulated by the twin, suggests Cost among the existing routes at 93.6 percent held-out synthetic test accuracy. A separate exact bounded verifier checks the three policy optima. A human production manager remains the final authority and no machine is controlled.
svg.text: One line stops. Three verified routes. One human decides.
Day 2 adds one local learned suggestion - never a generated route.
Twin view mirrors the same executable state.
Builds routes · no training · no LLM
Does not reuse planner construction logic; exhaustively cross-checks the 3 policy optima.
Selects among existing routes · never creates or edits a schedule.
Suggestion is advisory; manager may choose any route.
93.6% is held-out synthetic validation, not plant performance.
Pilot rule: retrain locally on the site's real incident history.
